# Goals

Your task is to ensure consistency between different files in the repo.

# Steps to follow

1. Check that any updates made to `$ROOT/eng_guidance/engineering_quality_guidelines.md` are reflected in `$ROOT/idm_eng_plugin/**/*.md` (i.e. all agent and skill files)

2. Check that any updates made to `$ROOT/docs_guidance/*.md` are reflected in `$ROOT/idm_docs_plugin/**/*.md` (i.e. all agent and skill files)

3. Check for any inconsistencies between the repo structure and the readmes, e.g. outdated paths, incorrect filenames, missing folders, etc.
